\tzpentry{ID11372}{Higher-Topos Physical Reality Carrier}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The topological unification source defines the higher topos of physical reality as an inverse-limit carrier over simplicial-set stages.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\mathcal{T}_{\infty} := \varprojlim_{n\to\infty}\left[\mathbf{Set}_{\Delta^{op}}^{(n)}\right]
